title: spermacoce pumilio
intro: Spermacoce pumilio, also known as the small buttonweed, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Spermacoce pumilio include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Spermacoce pumilio is traditionally prepared as an infusion or decoction, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
